## 🔧 Actual Changes

# Change Analysis for v44.2.0

## New Features
Rewrite README lede + add IMPROVEMENT_TRACKER

## Improvements
Make Bash 5+ requirement explicit in CI and the test runner
Filter Manifest's own bookkeeping commits from generated changelogs
Add bats-core test harness + GitHub Actions CI
Add status, doctor, config CRUD, native PR, and shell completions
Remove legacy .env config support entirely
Tier 1 safety: gate global-config writes, rename ship workflow, fail fast on missing yq
